content.json:
# Sentinel Data Tier Cost Analysis

This workbook analyzes ingestion volumes across **three tiers** to optimize your Microsoft Sentinel costs:

| Tier | Use Case | Ingestion Cost | Retention |
|------|----------|----------------|----------|
| **Analytic** | Real-time detection rules, workbooks, hunting | Full price per GB | 90 days free |
| **Data Lake** | Long-term retention, compliance, forensics | Low price per GB | Up to 12 years |
| **Defender XDR only** | Already available 30 days in Defender portal | Free (no Sentinel ingestion) | 30 days |

All data is pulled automatically from the built-in `Usage` table.

---

parameters.name: DataLakeRetentionMonths
parameters.jsonData: [{"value": "1", "label": "1 month"}, {"value": "3", "label": "3 months"}, {"value": "6", "label": "6 months"}, {"value": "12", "label": "1 year"}, {"value": "24", "label": "2 years"}, {"value": "36", "label": "3 years"}, {"value": "60", "label": "5 years"}, {"value": "84", "label": "7 years"}, {"value": "120", "label": "10 years"}]
parameters.label: Data Lake Retention

parameters.name: AnalyticTierTables
parameters.query:
Usage
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where IsBillable == true
| distinct DataType
| order by DataType asc
parameters.label: Analytic Tier Tables (real-time detections)

parameters.name: DataLakeTierTables
parameters.query:
Usage
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where IsBillable == true
| distinct DataType
| order by DataType asc
parameters.label: Data Lake Tables (long-term retention)

content.json:
> **How to use:** Select tables for each tier above. Tables not selected in either list are treated as **Defender XDR only** (30 days free in Defender, no Sentinel ingestion cost).

---
## Overview: Three-Tier Cost Model

content.query:
let AnalyticCost = toreal('{AnalyticCostPerGB}');
let DLIngestionCost = toreal('{DataLakeIngestionCostPerGB}');
let DLStorageCost = toreal('{DataLakeStorageCostPerGB}');
let DLRetentionMonths = toreal('{DataLakeRetentionMonths}');
let CompressionRatio = 6.0;
let Curr = '{CurrencySymbol}';
let AnalyticTables = dynamic([{AnalyticTierTables}]);
let DataLakeTables = dynamic([{DataLakeTierTables}]);
let Days = datetime_diff('day', {TimeRange:end}, {TimeRange:start});
Usage
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where IsBillable == true
| summarize TotalMB = sum(Quantity) by DataType
| extend DailyAvgGB = TotalMB / 1000.0 / Days
| extend Tier = case(
    DataType in (AnalyticTables), 'Analytic',
    DataType in (DataLakeTables), 'DataLake',
    'XDROnly')
| summarize
    TotalDailyGB = round(sum(DailyAvgGB), 2),
    AnalyticDailyGB = round(sumif(DailyAvgGB, Tier == 'Analytic'), 2),
    DataLakeDailyGB = round(sumif(DailyAvgGB, Tier == 'DataLake'), 2),
    XDROnlyDailyGB = round(sumif(DailyAvgGB, Tier == 'XDROnly'), 2)
| extend
    CurrentMonthlyCost = round(TotalDailyGB * 30 * AnalyticCost, 2),
    AnalyticIngestion = round(AnalyticDailyGB * 30 * AnalyticCost, 2),
    DLIngestion = round(DataLakeDailyGB * 30 * DLIngestionCost, 2),
    DLStorage = round(DataLakeDailyGB * 30 * DLRetentionMonths / CompressionRatio * DLStorageCost, 2)
| extend
    OptimizedMonthlyCost = round(AnalyticIngestion + DLIngestion + DLStorage, 2),
    MonthlySavings = round(CurrentMonthlyCost - (AnalyticIngestion + DLIngestion + DLStorage), 2)
| extend SavingsPercent = round(MonthlySavings / CurrentMonthlyCost * 100, 1)
| project
    Metric = pack_array(
        'Total Daily Ingestion',
        'Analytic Tier (daily)',
        'Data Lake Tier (daily)',
        'Defender XDR Only (daily)',
        'Current Monthly Cost',
        'Optimized Monthly Cost',
        'Monthly Savings',
        'Savings'),
    Value = pack_array(
        strcat(tostring(TotalDailyGB), ' GB'),
        strcat(tostring(AnalyticDailyGB), ' GB'),
        strcat(tostring(DataLakeDailyGB), ' GB'),
        strcat(tostring(XDROnlyDailyGB), ' GB'),
        strcat(tostring(CurrentMonthlyCost), ' ', Curr),
        strcat(tostring(OptimizedMonthlyCost), ' ', Curr),
        strcat(tostring(MonthlySavings), ' ', Curr),
        strcat(tostring(SavingsPercent), ' %'))
| mv-expand Metric to typeof(string), Value to typeof(string)
content.title: Summary: Current vs Optimized 3-Tier Cost ({CurrencySymbol})

content.query:
let AnalyticCost = toreal('{AnalyticCostPerGB}');
let DLIngestionCost = toreal('{DataLakeIngestionCostPerGB}');
let DLStorageCost = toreal('{DataLakeStorageCostPerGB}');
let DLRetentionMonths = toreal('{DataLakeRetentionMonths}');
let CompressionRatio = 6.0;
let AnalyticTables = dynamic([{AnalyticTierTables}]);
let DataLakeTables = dynamic([{DataLakeTierTables}]);
let Days = datetime_diff('day', {TimeRange:end}, {TimeRange:start});
Usage
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where IsBillable == true
| summarize TotalMB = sum(Quantity) by DataType
| extend DailyAvgGB = TotalMB / 1000.0 / Days
| extend Tier = case(
    DataType in (AnalyticTables), 'Analytic',
    DataType in (DataLakeTables), 'DataLake',
    'XDROnly')
| summarize
    AnalyticGB = sumif(DailyAvgGB, Tier == 'Analytic'),
    DataLakeGB = sumif(DailyAvgGB, Tier == 'DataLake'),
    XDROnlyGB = sumif(DailyAvgGB, Tier == 'XDROnly')
| extend
    CurrentAll = round((AnalyticGB + DataLakeGB + XDROnlyGB) * 30 * AnalyticCost, 2),
    OptAnalytic = round(AnalyticGB * 30 * AnalyticCost, 2),
    OptDLIngestion = round(DataLakeGB * 30 * DLIngestionCost, 2),
    OptDLStorage = round(DataLakeGB * 30 * DLRetentionMonths / CompressionRatio * DLStorageCost, 2),
    OptXDR = 0.0
| project
    CostCategory = pack_array(
        'Current (All Analytic)',
        'Analytic Tier Ingestion',
        'Data Lake Ingestion',
        'Data Lake Storage',
        'Defender XDR Only'),
    Cost = pack_array(CurrentAll, OptAnalytic, OptDLIngestion, OptDLStorage, OptXDR)
| mv-expand CostCategory to typeof(string), Cost to typeof(real)
content.title: Monthly Cost Breakdown by Category ({CurrencySymbol})
Data Volume Split by Tier (GB/day)

content.json:
---
## Data Lake Cost Detail

Data Lake storage is billed at a **6:1 compression ratio**. Example: 600 GB raw = 100 GB billed.

content.query:
let DLIngestionCost = toreal('{DataLakeIngestionCostPerGB}');
let DLStorageCost = toreal('{DataLakeStorageCostPerGB}');
let DLRetentionMonths = toreal('{DataLakeRetentionMonths}');
let CompressionRatio = 6.0;
let Curr = '{CurrencySymbol}';
let DataLakeTables = dynamic([{DataLakeTierTables}]);
let Days = datetime_diff('day', {TimeRange:end}, {TimeRange:start});
Usage
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where IsBillable == true
| where DataType in (DataLakeTables)
| summarize TotalMB = sum(Quantity) by DataType
| extend
    DailyAvgGB = round(TotalMB / 1000.0 / Days, 3),
    MonthlyRawGB = round(TotalMB / 1000.0 / Days * 30, 1)
| extend
    MonthlyIngestionCost = round(DailyAvgGB * 30 * DLIngestionCost, 2),
    RetainedRawGB = round(MonthlyRawGB * DLRetentionMonths, 1),
    CompressedGB = round(MonthlyRawGB * DLRetentionMonths / CompressionRatio, 1)
| extend
    MonthlyStorageCost = round(CompressedGB * DLStorageCost, 2),
    TotalMonthlyCost = round((DailyAvgGB * 30 * DLIngestionCost) + (MonthlyRawGB * DLRetentionMonths / CompressionRatio * DLStorageCost), 2)
| project
    DataType,
    DailyAvgGB,
    MonthlyRawGB,
    RetainedRawGB,
    CompressedGB,
    MonthlyIngestionCost,
    MonthlyStorageCost,
    TotalMonthlyCost
| order by TotalMonthlyCost desc
content.title: Data Lake Tables: Ingestion + Storage Cost Detail ({CurrencySymbol})

content.query:
let AnalyticCost = toreal('{AnalyticCostPerGB}');
let DLIngestionCost = toreal('{DataLakeIngestionCostPerGB}');
let DLStorageCost = toreal('{DataLakeStorageCostPerGB}');
let DLRetentionMonths = toreal('{DataLakeRetentionMonths}');
let CompressionRatio = 6.0;
let AnalyticTables = dynamic([{AnalyticTierTables}]);
let DataLakeTables = dynamic([{DataLakeTierTables}]);
let Days = datetime_diff('day', {TimeRange:end}, {TimeRange:start});
Usage
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where IsBillable == true
| summarize TotalMB = sum(Quantity) by DataType
| extend
    DailyAvgGB = round(TotalMB / 1000.0 / Days, 3),
    Tier = case(
        DataType in (AnalyticTables), 'Analytic',
        DataType in (DataLakeTables), 'Data Lake',
        'XDR Only')
| extend
    CurrentMonthlyCost = round(DailyAvgGB * 30 * AnalyticCost, 2),
    OptimizedMonthlyCost = round(case(
        Tier == 'Analytic', DailyAvgGB * 30 * AnalyticCost,
        Tier == 'Data Lake', (DailyAvgGB * 30 * DLIngestionCost) + (DailyAvgGB * 30 * DLRetentionMonths / CompressionRatio * DLStorageCost),
        0.0), 2)
| extend
    MonthlySavings = round(CurrentMonthlyCost - OptimizedMonthlyCost, 2),
    SavingsPercent = iff(CurrentMonthlyCost > 0, round((CurrentMonthlyCost - OptimizedMonthlyCost) / CurrentMonthlyCost * 100, 1), 0.0)
| project
    DataType,
    DailyAvgGB,
    Tier,
    CurrentMonthlyCost,
    OptimizedMonthlyCost,
    MonthlySavings,
    SavingsPercent
| order by MonthlySavings desc
content.title: Per-Table: Tier Assignment and Savings ({CurrencySymbol})
Top 15 Tables: Monthly Savings vs All-Analytic ({CurrencySymbol})

content.query:
Usage
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where IsBillable == true
| summarize DailyGB = round(sum(Quantity) / 1000.0, 3) by bin(StartTime, 1d)
| order by StartTime asc
content.title: Total Daily Billable Ingestion (GB)

content.query:
let AnalyticTables = dynamic([{AnalyticTierTables}]);
let DataLakeTables = dynamic([{DataLakeTierTables}]);
Usage
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where IsBillable == true
| summarize DailyGB = round(sum(Quantity) / 1000.0, 3) by bin(StartTime, 1d), DataType
| extend Tier = case(
    DataType in (AnalyticTables), 'Analytic',
    DataType in (DataLakeTables), 'Data Lake',
    'XDR Only')
| summarize DailyGB = round(sum(DailyGB), 3) by bin(StartTime, 1d), Tier
| order by StartTime asc
content.title: Daily Ingestion by Tier (GB)
Daily Cost: Current vs Optimized ({CurrencySymbol})
